category_sources: source_facts.description says PHP Static Analysis Tool; official Psalm site says Psalm is a static analysis tool for PHP that identifies problems in code.
display_name_sources: Official homepage brands the project as Psalm; source_facts.name is psalm.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to Documentation; official docs page provides documentation home, installation, configuration, command-line usage, type annotations, plugins, and security analysis.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/vimeo/psalm, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official docs describe type-related bug detection, taint analysis, automatic fixes, refactoring, and Language Server support.
